title: Resource counts zeroed out for LXD KVM pod, VM creation fails
description: When adding a LXD host as a KVM pod, the resource counts (cores, memory) are reported as zero in the MAAS UI and API, despite the host having ample resources. Attempting to compose a VM results in a validation error due to the core count.
steps_to_reproduce: Add a LXD host as a KVM pod.
Ensure the host has ample resources (RAM, CPU, storage).
Click refresh host to update hypervisor info.
Attempt to compose a VM in the UI.
actual_result: A field validation error is shown in the UI. Journald logs indicate an issue with the available core count. 'maas admin vm-hosts read' shows resource counts as zero.

actual_resources.memory: 251Gi total, 170Gi used, 67Gi free, 34Gi shared, 50Gi buff/cache, 80Gi available

notes: Likely a regression or continuation of previous bug 2048399. Needs investigation.
